properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise unbroken Praise unending Be Yours, be Yours forevermore Praise untainted Praise unfading Be Yours, be Yours forevermore Be Yours, be Yours forevermore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Unbroken praise be Yours, God, forever All my praise be Yours, God, forever Lord take this life, let it become Your throne Unbroken praise, be Yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My surrender My devotion Be Yours, be Yours forevermore Be Yours, be Yours forevermore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Unbroken praise be Yours, God, forever All my praise be Yours, God, forever Lord take this life, let it become Your throne Unbroken praise be Yours Unbroken praise be Yours, God, forever All my praise be Yours, God, forever Lord take this life, let it become Your throne Unbroken praise be Yours

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let my deeds outrun my words And let my life outweigh my songs Let my deeds outrun my words And let my life outweigh my songs!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Unbroken praise be Yours, God, forever All my praise be Yours, God, forever Lord take this life, let it become Your throne Unbroken praise be Yours, be Yours Unbroken praise be Yours, God, forever All my praise be Yours, God, forever Lord take this life, let it become Your throne Unbroken praise be Yours Unbroken praise be Yours My unbroken praise be Yours

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So let my deeds outrun my words And let my life outweigh my songs Unbroken praise be Yours
